info.description: HTTP API for the DNS filter: managing block lists, sources, clients, suggestions and runtime config.
info.title: DNS Filter API

409.description: discovery is not supported in the current deployment mode

post.description: Drops every entry from the in-memory DNS response cache. The next query for each name will be resolved upstream.

parameters.description: Record id and target active state
parameters.name: body

get.summary: Inspect a domain with reputation/diagnostic checks

post.summary: Pause the DNS filter for N minutes

delete.summary: Reset a runtime setting to its default

parameters.description: Source id and target active state
parameters.name: body

parameters.description: Suggestion id and target active state
parameters.name: body

parameters.description: Device key: the MAC or IP
parameters.name: value

parameters.description: Filter by verdict (true=blocked, false=allowed); omit for both
parameters.name: blocked

parameters.description: Filter by verdict (true=blocked, false=allowed); omit for both
parameters.name: blocked

reasons.description:
Reasons holds the auto-block signal codes (#95); read paths must
Preload("Reasons") to populate it. See CreateDomainWithReasons.

valid.description: Valid is true if Time is not NULL

cleared.description:
Cleared is the number of entries removed by this call. Zero is a
legitimate outcome (operator flushed an already-cold cache) and the
frontend differentiates it from an error in the toast text.

paused_until.description:
PausedUntil is the unix-second deadline of an active pause, or 0 if no
pause is active. The frontend uses this absolute value to drive its
countdown without depending on server-supplied "seconds left".
